utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No , still too ethnic . My agent thinks I should have a name that is more neutral .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Plus , you know , I think it should be Joe .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You know , Joey makes me sound like I am , I dunno , this big .

emotion_cause.span: 5_Joey makes me sound like I am , I dunno , this big .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Stalin ... Stalin ... do I know that name ? It sounds familiar .

emotion_cause.span: 8_Stalin ... Stalin ... do I know that name ? It sounds familiar .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , it does not ring a bell with me ...

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Joe Stalin . You know , that is pretty good .

emotion_cause.span: 10_Joe Stalin . You know , that is pretty good .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Joseph Stalin . I think you would remember that !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh yes ! Bye Bye Birdie , starring Joseph Stalin . Joseph Stalin is the Fiddler on the Roof .

emotion_cause.span: 13_Bye Bye Birdie , starring Joseph Stalin . Joseph Stalin is the Fiddler on the Roof .
